title: Cadaeda
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Cadaeda''' was the traditional title of the dean of the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
